About Me

Passionate about code & craft

I'm a Full-Stack Developer at Snaphomz — building AI-powered real estate products on AWS. I craft stunning Next.js frontends, powerful NestJS backends, and intelligent ML features (TensorFlow, cosine similarity) that bring transparency to agents, buyers & sellers.

What sets me apart is my obsession with design quality — I don't just build functional apps, I build experiences people remember. Every component is crafted with intention: clean architecture, smooth animations, and interfaces users love.

Alumni-Student Networking
& Mentorship Platform

A production-grade full-stack platform with intelligent ML-powered matchmaking, real-time video communication, and a sleek, modern UI — deployed live and actively used.

  • Integrated Content-Based Filtering algorithm for smart mentor matching
  • Jitsi Meet API for seamless real-time video communication sessions
  • Event & job notifications boosting user engagement by ~30%
  • Full unit and system testing pipeline for reliability validation

React App

A polished, production-ready social media app with real-time feeds, smooth animations, and Firebase-powered backend — built with React best practices and a beautiful responsive design.

  • Firebase Auth + Firestore for user data management of 50+ accounts
  • React Router for seamless client-side SPA navigation
  • Real-time feed rendering with React Hooks and Firestore listeners
  • Data migration and configuration using Firebase and SQL-based structures
